common.loadError: Could not load data — reload the page.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.badgeTitle: No servers, no accounts, no network requests. Click for the privacy policy.
privacy.viewPolicy: 0 bytes leave your device — view privacy policy

popup.loadError: Could not load stats — try reopening the popup.

focus.title: Focus today
focus.note: Productive ÷ (productive + distracting). Work & Dev count as productive; target {target}%. Change a site's category to reclassify it.

heatmap.title: Activity heatmap
heatmap.gridAria: Browsing activity by weekday and hour of day

comparison.weekSub: Last 7 days vs the 7 before · today still counting
comparison.monthSub: Last 30 days vs the 30 before · today still counting
comparison.notEnough: Not enough history yet — check back after a few days.

worklog.title: What did I work on?
worklog.summary: — you spent {time} across no sites. | — you spent {time} across {count} site. | — you spent {time} across {count} sites.

tabTable.title: Open tabs by time
tabTable.sub: Active time per site · last 90 days

settings.title: Settings
settings.rulesHint: Most popular sites are recognized automatically. Add a rule only for one we don't classify yet: any address containing your text goes to that category (checked before the built-in rules).
settings.ruleExists: That pattern already has a rule.
settings.encHint: Encrypts a full JSON backup with a passphrase (AES-256-GCM). Keep it safe — it can't be recovered.
settings.restoreEncryptedPrompt: This backup is encrypted. Enter its passphrase to continue.
settings.replaceBody: This deletes the data currently stored on this device and restores {days} daily records and {sessions} sessions{from}. This cannot be undone.
settings.wipeBody: This permanently removes every session, daily total, and tab record stored on this device. Settings are kept. This cannot be undone.
settings.idleHint: Tracking pauses after this long without mouse or keyboard input. Raise it if you read without scrolling.

onboarding.title: Welcome to TabStyr
onboarding.lede: A quiet picture of where your browser time actually goes. Here's the gist:
onboarding.trackBody: Active foreground time on each site — the tab you're actually looking at. Background audio is counted separately.
onboarding.privateBody: Everything stays in this browser. No account, no servers, no network calls. Export or wipe your data anytime.
onboarding.categorizedBody: Sites are sorted into the categories below — the colored dots across the dashboard use these. Reclassify any site, or add your own rules in Settings.
